items.plan:
1. Refill metformin 500mg daily - 90-day supply
2. Refill lisinopril 10mg daily - 90-day supply
3. Schedule follow-up labs (A1c, BMP) in 4-6 weeks
4. Continue dietary and exercise modifications
5. Return in 3 months for full follow-up

4. Continue lisinopril 10mg daily for blood pressure
